name: Charm Diamond Centres
message: Charm Diamond Centres is a jeweler retailer store. Charm Diamond Centres was founded in Nova Scotia by Richard Calder in 1972, thechain is still owned and operated by the Calder family.We will upload almost 19gb of corporate data soon. Employee information (passports, DLs, health information and so on), financials, lots of clients' files, projects, NDAs, etc.
